description: Canned model responses keyed by (promptVersion, caseName). The ScriptedLlmProvider returns these instead of calling Anthropic, so the eval is deterministic and runs offline. Authoring guideline: write each version's responses as if you were grading a real LLM that just read the corresponding prompt — V1 sees only a one-line instruction (so it often skips HSN/SAC or invents weak codes), V2 has worked examples (so it picks up the format and the 9954xx range), V3 has the full HSN/SAC catalogue (so it nails the specific service code).
